Skills.WthC_DriveResonance_TEXT1: Instantly increases fleet speed to %s and %s detection activities of nearby fleets for the duration.
Skills.WthC_DriveResonance_TEXT2: However, detecting in the hyperspace becomes more difficult, reducing fleet detection range by %s.

items.WthC_mace: After using it, you might figure out how this thing works? Just give it a try.
items.WthC_page: The terminal seems to contain some knowledge. Use it to acquire them.
items.WthC_Card: This card appears to interface with the ship's systems, enabling a special automated mode. After interfacing, a mysterious communication comes through. Use it to see who is contacting you.
items.WthC_CardRe: Behind this Wraith Key is a genuine "Witch." It seems she will provide you with some limited free assistance... If used properly, these living legends can unleash terrifying potential on the battlefield.
items.WthC_CardRe7: (The Wraith Key does not require a specific interface. Simply place it on the bridge while active to transfer control of the ship to the Elis Temple...)
items.WthC_Card2: Given your relationship with the Crimson Lord, she might be willing to lend you some elites from another world to assist in upcoming battles... Of course, for this eccentric who always talks about costs, perhaps paying her some meaningless credits is necessary?

event.WthC_Test_Event_3: Allows you to quickly obtain three officers from the end of the mission tree
event.WthC_Test_Event_4: This bar event will no longer exist after the official release—
